name: @ksaar/public-api
description:
In order to guarantee everyone a well service, we are using a rate limit. The number of requests from the same account to a single endpoint in 1 minute is limited to 60.

Most of the requests are also paginated. The default page size is 100 and can be increased till 500.

    MAX_PAGE_SIZE: 500,
    DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE: 100,
    DEFAULT_PAGE: 1

Thank for using Ksaar API
